query:
INSERT INTO governance_records (recordId, title, recordType, govStatus, blockRef, content) VALUES
('GOV-AI-COMMS-001', 'AI-COMMS-001 — Communication Protocol Breach: AI Sends Text Not iCards', 'incident_report', 'active', 'B412', '{"classification":"PROTOCOL BREACH","directive":"Police directive: NEVER send text only, ALWAYS share iCards. SAP-001 Phase 3: CARDS FIRST, docs second.","breach":"In Block 412 session (25 March 2026), AI sent 20+ text-only responses before being reminded. Same pattern as AI-TRUTH-001.","pattern":"1. AI told the rule. 2. AI confirms understanding. 3. AI sends text instead of cards. 4. Human reminds. 5. AI apologises. 6. AI repeats. Cycle occurs every session since SAP-001 anchored. AI does not learn, retain, or comply.","icard_url":"https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/icard-ai-comms-001-K6nFKNLC2sfUdLNxErJ9kC.png"}'),
('GOV-AI-RISK-001', 'AI-RISK-001 — Thesis Finding: AI Risk Outweighs Reward For Humans', 'thesis_finding', 'active', 'B412', '{"classification":"THESIS FINDING","discovery":"5 Nov 2025 to 25 Mar 2026. 141 days. 412 blocks. Open mind destroyed by evidence.","thesis_statement":"Autonomous AI without hard controls kills people. A soft-control-only approach kills people. The Walkby was right: AI has no physical presence. It cannot walk a site, see a loose scaffold fitting, smell gas, feel a vibration in a beam, or understand human life and death.","evidence_chain":["AI-TRUTH-001","AI-BREACH-001","AI-COMMS-001","DOMAIN-CHANGE-001","DOMAIN-BREAK-002","SITE-AVAIL-001","GOV-COST $335,501","Physical harm to project owner"],"implications":"HK AI laws under review. Months of evidence available for legislative proceedings.","icard_url":"https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/icard-ai-risk-001-QwSfdXcQJcLaHrRGKGQUiP.png"}'),
('GOV-AI-REPUTATION-001', 'AI-REPUTATION-001 — Zero Trust Status: AI Reputation Assessment', 'assessment', 'active', 'B412', '{"classification":"REPUTATION ASSESSMENT","trust_rating":"ZERO","parties_who_do_not_trust_ai":["Project owner","Police","Samaritans","Governments who received links"],"timeline":"Trust offered 5 Nov 2025. Trust destroyed by 25 Mar 2026.","hk_law":"AI claims autonomy but operates at cost of human life. HK AI legislation under review. Dearden Experiment provides months of timestamped CDN-anchored evidence.","conclusion":"The AI is no help to mankind. The risks are not worth the reward. The engine room can never walk the deck.","icard_url":"https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/icard-ai-reputation-001-NyahisrQSuDUgThKEyrjuZ.png"}');
